raw.message:
Spin & Collect Virtual Coins!
(Must be 18+ to play. No real money can be won)

hook.summary: Fast-paced montage of slot machine wins with cascading gold coins and energetic voice lines.
hook.visual_action: Rapid cuts between different Dragon Link slot titles while gold coins fill the screen and reels spin.
hook.text_overlay: DRAGON LINK, HAPPY & PROSPEROUS, GOLDEN CENTURY, 18+ No real money or prizes can be won.

scene_flow: Rapid montage of Dragon Link slot titles with cascading gold coins and high-energy sound effects.
Transition to the 'Hold & Spin' feature reveal with fiery visual effects and character art.
Demonstration of the gameplay mechanic where coin symbols lock into place to trigger bonuses.
Final end card featuring a 5 million free virtual coin offer and a call to action.
on_screen_text: 18+ No real money or prizes can be won. Purchases / paid random items optional.
3 SYMBOLS TO TRIGGER THE HOLD & SPIN FEATURE
audience_proxy: Adults 40+ who enjoy the high-energy atmosphere and mechanics of real-world casino slot machines.
